title: John Oliver Knows He's F*CKED After Paramount Buys HBO...
description:
John Oliver has been taking shots at Paramount and the Ellisons, and now they're going to be his new bosses. His contract for 'Last Week Tonight' is up for renewal, and it probably is NOT going to end well for him. Especially since David Ellison has made it know that there will be cutbacks and layoffs.

Watch the podcast episodes on YouTube and all major podcast hosts including Spotify.

CLOWNFISH TV is an independent, opinionated news and commentary podcast that covers Entertainment and Tech from a consumer’s point of view. We talk about Gaming, Comics, Anime, TV, Movies, Animation and more. Hosted by Kneon and Geeky Sparkles.
